_README: ADDITIVE fragment for ~/.claude/settings.json — MERGE/COMPOSE this with your existing hooks, do not overwrite. Add the mesh-inject entries inside your existing SessionStart and UserPromptSubmit arrays (where e.g. a TZ/locale hook may already live); do NOT replace the whole hooks block. mesh-inject must be on PATH (or replace command with the absolute venv path). The hook is fail-closed: on any error it exits 0, so it never blocks a session. See hooks/README.md and design §5.
